# Documentation Instructions

- Keep setup, run, and test commands accurate for the current project layout.
- Keep the endpoints table in sync with the implemented API.
- Keep request examples aligned with the models and allowed `BookStatus` values.
- If behavior changes, update any affected endpoint descriptions or examples in the same change.
- Prefer concise documentation that matches the small scope of this repository.
